backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing user profiles, IP record registration, and an IPGT token ledger with access control, blob storage, and migration mixins. Exposes query/update methods for profile management, token transfers/burns, and IP record CRUD/search.
backend/migration.mo: State migration module that upgrades the actor's user profile type by adding an `organisation` field (defaulting to empty string) to all existing profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (IP registration gating, ProfileSetupModal organisation field, cross-chain simulation) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose and styling conventions for the IPGT platform.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with the IPGT page title, favicon, and a root div that loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router tree with routes for Home, Register IP, IP Database, and Whitepaper, and conditionally renders ProfileSetupModal when an authenticated user has no saved profile.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the IPGT brand, navigation links, a feature list with shield icons, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, nav links, and an Internet Identity login/logout button that also displays the authenticated user's profile name.
frontend/src/components/IPCard.tsx: Card component that displays a summary of an IP record including its category badge, title, description, jurisdiction, registration date, and truncated document hash.
frontend/src/components/IPDetailModal.ts: Modal dialog showing full details of an IP record, including metadata fields, the full document hash with copy support, and mock cross-chain transaction data for Ethereum and Solana.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple page layout wrapper that composes the Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Onboarding modal form that collects a new user's display name, organisation, and optional email, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/RegistrationSucc: Success modal shown after an IP record is registered, confirming the ICP canister storage and displaying mock Ethereum and Solana cross-chain transaction details.
frontend/src/components/TokenStats.tsx: Displays IPGT token statistics (user balance, circulating supply, total burned) in either a compact inline layout or a full grid card layout.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the Internet Computer, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, token balances, and IP record CRUD operations using the canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with a dark navy/gold design system using OKLCH color variables, and defines utility classes for prose content and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoinDashboard.tsx: Placeholder page component for the coin dashboard that currently renders nothing.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero section, a three-step how-it-works guide, and feature/stats sections promoting the decentralized IP registry platform.
frontend/src/pages/IPDatabase.tsx: Searchable and filterable IP record browser page that displays pre-seeded mock records alongside live blockchain data, with pagination and a detail modal.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterIP.tsx: Form page for registering new intellectual property records, handling file upload with SHA-256 hashing, authentication gating, and submission to the canister via the registerIP mutation.
frontend/src/pages/Whitepaper.tsx: Renders the IPGT whitepaper page with a sticky table-of-contents sidebar that highlights the active section via IntersectionObserver, smooth-scroll navigation, and a print-to-PDF button. Contains all 12 whitepaper sections as static content.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routes, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy/gold/charcoal color palettes, Playfair Display and Inter font families, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall IPGT project state at version 17, documenting the platform summary, architectural decisions (ICP canisters, Internet Identity gating, simulated cross-chain badges), known issues, and a list of implemented features.
